title: olearia canescens
intro: Olearia canescens, also known as tree daisy or woolly daisy, is a shrub native to New Zealand, characterized by its woody stems and greyish leaves. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating digestive issues and as an anti-inflammatory agent. The health benefits of Olearia canescens include its ability to soothe stomach ulcers, reduce fever, and alleviate pain. Olearia canescens can be prepared in various herbal forms, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
